Identity.Name: StingDetailLevels
Identity.Definition: View detail-level codes used by the Drawing Type registry and the per-host view-template apply step. Maps directly to Revit ViewDetailLevel (Coarse / Medium / Fine) and to equivalent settings in BlenderBIM's draw style and ArchiCAD's view detail switches.

Governance.StandardsBasis: Revit API ViewDetailLevel enum; STING DrawingType.DetailLevel field

Value.Definition: Coarse — schematic representation, line work only. Used for small-scale plans, site, key plans.
Medium — STING default. Shows construction layers / connectors / fittings at production scales.
Fine — full graphic detail. Used for details, sections at 1:20 / 1:10 / 1:5, fabrication spool drawings.
